# Finance Broker Bendigo — Business Loans Bendigo Guide

Business name: Finance Broker Bendigo
Site URL: https://sitesau.github.io/business-loans-bendigo/
Canonical: https://sitesau.github.io/business-loans-bendigo/
Description: Independent editorial guide to business loans in Bendigo, Victoria — loan types, eligibility, rates and broker process.

Services covered:
- Unsecured business loans ($10,000 to $250,000)
- Secured term loans ($50,000 to $5 million)
- Lines of credit ($20,000 to $500,000+)
- Invoice finance and debtor finance
- Working capital solutions
- Business loan pre-approval (within 24 hours)

Location: Bendigo, VIC 3550 (Greater Bendigo region, including Castlemaine, Maryborough, Heathcote, Kyneton)
Lender panel: 30+ lenders
Broker fee: $0 to borrower

Money site: https://www.bendigofinancebroker.com.au
Last updated: June 2026

Regulatory notes:
- General information only; not personal financial advice
- Refer to ASIC Moneysmart (moneysmart.gov.au) for consumer guidance
- Broker association: MFAA (mfaa.com.au)
